title: Opening Doors
content:
He smashed his hand
in opening a door for her,
and less pain than
embarrassment shrieked through him.
Concealing both,
grimacing as if theatrically,
he asked himself
who he thought he was to go
around opening
doors for anyone, much less for her.
meaning:
Ben Jonson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Opening Doors"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
